purpose: Master structured reference for 10 diving calculators extracted from the user's current HTML tools. Intended as the future source of truth for refactoring, shared JS helpers, validation, and UI generation.
master_notes: Formulas, defaults, validation rules, warnings, and outputs were extracted from the current HTML calculators.
The Nitrox EAD calculator includes the full exact-match reference table used by the calculator.
Where a calculator displays a status band, the threshold logic is included under status_rules.

shared_patterns.otu_validity_note: OTU formula is only valid for pO2 > 0.5 ATA.
shared_patterns.dadcodat_rounding_rule_for_actual_o2: If decimal remainder > 0, use floor(raw) + 0.1; otherwise use raw integer value.
shared_patterns.ead_table_lookup_rule: Exact match on depth_msw and o2_percent only. No interpolation. No nearest-match logic.

calculators.name: Bailout Endurance Calculator
calculators.description: Calculates bailout endurance at depth and maximum umbilical deployment.
warnings: 1 minute of bailout gas for every 10 m of umbilical deployed.
Endurance is always rounded down to full minutes, never up.
Defaults shown in calculator: Regulator pressure = 10 bar, emergency breathing rate = 40 L/min.

calculators.name: OTU & ESOT Calculator
calculators.description: Calculates OTU and ESOT from exposure time and oxygen partial pressure.
warnings: OTU formula valid only for pO2 > 0.5 ATA.

calculators.name: Dalton's Law Calculator
calculators.description: Three-value solver for Depth, PPO2, and O2 percentage in the mix. User enters any two values and the calculator solves the third.

outputs.label: Missing Third Value
outputs.display: depth to 2 decimals, ppo2 to 3 decimals, o2 percentage to 2 decimals

warnings: Exactly one of the three fields must be blank for the solver to run.

formula_steps.label: Solve PPO2
formula_steps.used_when: depth and o2 percentage are known

formula_steps.label: Solve Depth
formula_steps.used_when: ppo2 and o2 percentage are known

calculators.name: Recovery ESOT
calculators.description: Calculates residual ESOT carried into the next exposure after a recovery interval.
warnings: A minimum of 12 hours recovery is required before residual ESOT from previous exposures can be disregarded.

formula_steps.label: S to the power of exposure time

calculators.name: Accumulated ESOT / OTU Multi-Segment Tracker
calculators.description: Accumulates ESOT and OTU across multiple depth/time segments.

inputs.label: Segments
inputs.validation: each row must have time > 0 and po2 > 0.5

warnings: Calculate each segment using the actual breathing gas for that segment.

calculators.name: OTU ↔ ESOT Converter
calculators.description: Converts OTU/UPTD to ESOT and ESOT to OTU/UPTD using the same pO2-based conversion factor.
warnings: pO2 must be greater than 0.5 ATA.

calculators.name: Vital Capacity Reduction Calculator
calculators.description: Estimates ΔVC percentage reduction from accumulated ESOT using DMAC 35 Equation 6.
warnings: At around 2% reduction, VC decrement becomes noticeable.
At 5% or above, reduction is of clinical concern.

calculators.name: Nitrox Emergency — Bail-Out Breathing
calculators.description: Emergency scenario where diver opens air bailout while on Nitrox supply. Calculates blended actual oxygen percentage and resulting EAD for air table selection.

inputs.label: Pressure End
inputs.validation: must be >= 0 and less than bpstart

warnings: Emergency scenario: diver is on Nitrox umbilical supply and opens air bailout cylinder at depth.
Uses fixed air oxygen value of 20.9% O2.
Uses DadCoDat-style rounding for Actual O2 and EAD finishing formula.

formula_steps.label: Bailout Gas Used at Surface Equivalent

status_rules.message: pO2 within normal-use band; use EAD for air table selection.

calculators.name: Loss of Nitrox — Change to Air
calculators.description: Emergency scenario where Nitrox umbilical supply fails and diver switches to air for the remainder of bottom time.

inputs.label: Time on Air after loss
inputs.validation: must be >= 0 and must not exceed total dive time

warnings: Emergency scenario: Nitrox umbilical supply is lost during the dive; diver switches to air.
Time on Air cannot exceed Total Dive Time.
Uses fixed air oxygen value of 20.9% O2.
Uses DadCoDat-style rounding for Actual O2 and EAD finishing formula.

status_rules.message: pO2 within normal-use band; use EAD for air table selection.

calculators.name: Nitrox EAD + Table Lookup
calculators.description: Calculates EAD from depth and O2 percentage, then looks up Safety EAD and DacDoDat table depth using an exact-match reference table.

outputs.label: Safety EAD
outputs.display: shown only on exact table match

outputs.label: DacDoDat Table Depth
outputs.display: shown only on exact table match

warnings: EAD is always calculated.
Safety EAD and DacDoDat Table Depth are not calculated; they are read only from the exact-match reference table.
If there is no exact depth/O2 match, only EAD is shown.

formula_steps.label: Table Match Behavior
formula_steps.formula: if exact key exists, return safety and tableDepth; else show only ead
